assertions.title: Create Keyset Continue hands off to Generation Progress

steps.expected: Route advances to /create/progress, then chains to /create/profile
steps.observed: Route changed to /create (did not go directly to /create/progress)
Then advanced through /create/progress and chained into /create/profile

assertions.issues: From /demo/create-keyset, one click lands on /create instead of handing off directly to /create/progress.

steps.expected: Generation Progress heading, subtitle, 3 phases, and overall progress are visible
steps.observed: All required copy and phase rows were visible, including '1 of 3 phases'

assertions.title: Generation Progress stepper matches canonical create labels

steps.expected: Stepper labels are Create, Create Profile, Distribute Shares with step 1 active
steps.observed: Stepper labels matched canonical sequence and step 1 appeared active

assertions.title: Full Create → Shared happy path

steps.observed: First click transitioned to /create; a second click was required to enter /create/progress and then /create/profile

steps.expected: Shared flow steps progress in order with correct stepper states
steps.observed: After entering matching passwords and continuing, flow reached /create/distribute and /create/complete with expected headings

assertions.issues: Initial /demo/create-keyset click did not move directly into /create/progress as specified.

steps.action: On /demo/create-keyset, increase Total Shares from 3 to 4
steps.expected: Help text updates to 'Any 2 of 4 shares can sign — min threshold is 2, min shares is 3'
steps.observed: Help text updated immediately to 'Any 2 of 4 shares can sign — min threshold is 2, min shares is 3'

steps.expected: Help text updates to 'Any 3 of 4 shares can sign — min threshold is 2, min shares is 3'
steps.observed: Help text updated immediately to 'Any 3 of 4 shares can sign — min threshold is 2, min shares is 3'

assertions.title: Main app welcome → create happy path

steps.observed: After entering matching profile passwords and completing distribution actions, reached /create/distribute then /create/complete
Finish Distribution was enabled after distribution completion actions and navigated to /dashboard/bd897be88a4dec0564a21cb138b2fdc1a441915a2e4ebd0d7421a906a149fa54

frictions.description: On /demo/create-keyset, clicking 'Create Keyset' once navigates to /create first; another click is required to enter /create/progress.
frictions.resolution: Documented as assertion failures for VAL-CRT-007 and VAL-CRT-012.

frictions.description: Create Profile continue CTA is disabled until Password and Confirm Password match.
frictions.resolution: Entered matching values in both password fields before submitting.

frictions.description: Finish Distribution remained disabled until distribution actions were completed (Copy + QR for remote shares, then dismiss QR modal).
frictions.resolution: Completed share distribution actions and dismissed QR modal via Done before finishing.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 4 passed, 2 failed, 0 blocked. Failures were VAL-CRT-007 and VAL-CRT-012 due /demo/create-keyset requiring an extra click through /create before reaching /create/progress.
